---
title: "Licenses"
---

## Instructional Material

Unless otherwise noted, the instructional material in this course is made available under the [Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International license][cc-by-human].

You are free:

- to **share** the material in any medium or format
- to **adapt** the material for your own teaching or reuse

for any purpose, even commercially.

You must give appropriate credit, provide a link to the license, and indicate whether changes were made.

## Code and Software

Unless otherwise noted, example scripts, code snippets, and other software in this course are made available under the [MIT license][mit-license].

## Third-Party Material

Some pages may include links, images, excerpts, or examples from third parties. Those materials remain subject to their original attribution and licensing terms.

If you reuse material from this course and it includes third-party content, make sure you preserve that attribution and check whether additional permissions are needed.

## No Warranty

Course materials are provided as-is, without warranty of any kind.

[cc-by-human]: https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/
[mit-license]: https://opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html
